calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Aug-18-2010 Off Calendar

Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Off Calendar Aug-12-2010 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 218, Judge: Richard B. Ulmer, Jr., Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, CSR: Lois Jones, #3689.

Mohammad Walizadeh, Esq. appeared for plaintiff Glenborough New Montgomery, LLC, a Delaware limited liability company.
Naomi Oiwa, assistant sales manager for plaintiff, was placed under oath and examined.
No appearance by defendant Kinetic Networks, Inc., a Delaware corporation.
Default was entered against defendant on June 8, 2010.
Doe defendants were dismissed today, August 12, 2010.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff Glenborough New Montgomery, LLC, a Delaware limited liability company, and against the Defaulted Defendant Kinetic Networks, Inc., a Delaware corporation, as follows:

Damages/Principal - $132,162.73.
Prejudgment Interest - Waived.
Attorney's Fees - $9,466.50.
Costs - $880.00, for a total judgment in the amount of $142,509.23.

Judgment was submitted to and signed by the Court.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Jun-15-2010 Continued To Aug-30-10 At 01:30 P.M. In Dept 212

Notcie Of Motion And Motion To Vacate Sanctions Order
Off Calendar May-27-2010 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Plaintiff Glenborough New Montgomery LLC's Motion to Vacate Sanctions Order issued on April 26, 2010 in the amount of $350.00 is scheduled this day. There being no appearance nor objection, the tentative ruling to grant motion is adopted. The motion is ordered granted. Sanctions are ordered vacated. Moving party to submit a proposed order within five days. Proceedings not reported. (212)

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Apr-26-2010 Continued To Jun-28-10 At 01:30 P.M. In Dept 212
MINI MINUTES: No appearance. Plaintiff's counsel is sanctioned $350.00, for failure to appear. The OSC is re-set to 6/28/2010 at 1:30 PM, in Department 212. Proceedings not reported. (212)
